Rules.name: Same parent species
Rules.description: Two parents with the same breedingId produce that same Pal before special combinations or rank calculation are applied.

Rules.name: Special combination override
Rules.description: Pairs listed in SpecialCombinations produce the listed child regardless of breedingRank.

Rules.name: Standard rank result
Rules.description: For normal combinations, calculate floor((parentA.breedingRank + parentB.breedingRank + 1) / 2), then choose the canBeStandardChild Pal with the closest breedingRank.

Rules.name: Standard result tie breaker
Rules.description: If two eligible Pals are equally close to the target rank, the earlier Pal in Pals order wins.

Sources.name: Palworld.gg Breeding Calculator
Sources.usage: Primary source for breedingId, breedingRank, standard-result exclusions, special combinations, and calculation rules.

Sources.name: PalDB Breed
Sources.usage: Cross-check source for current Pal roster/codes and sample breeding calculator API outputs.

Sources.name: Palbreed Breeding Tree
Sources.usage: Additional calculator surface used to cross-check the current breeding roster.
